name: Lumba Lumba Diving Centre & Beach Resort

reviews.reviewTitle: Wonderful Location with direct access to the beach
reviews.reviewComments: The Lumba Lumba Diving Centre & Beach Resort is a wonderful place with direct access to the beach in about 40 meters from the bungalow. The rooms are clean and the staff is very friendly. But best of all is the somewhat positively secluded location, as it is much quieter here on the beach than in Iboih and we were able to enjoy our vacation to the fullest as a result. Would highly recommend this place!
reviews.roomTypeName: Living Colors Room with 2 Single Beds and Fan

reviews.reviewComments: Trlihat kurangbtrawat, dan agak sepi.. Mungkin karena lagi pandemi. Lebih banyak wisatawan asing
reviews.roomTypeName: Living Room Cottage with King Bed and Fan
